title: Commander Cressida
description: Commander Cressida is the best of the galactic astronauts. Her boots are on the ground and her head is in the stars. Fearless and curious, with her space dog Sirius.
altHero: Commander Cressida, a Black woman astronaut hero
alt1: Commander Cressida with Sirius the dog and her team of astronauts
alt2: Commander Cressida with green goggles on
alt3: team of astronauts holding shovels and looking at the sky
alt4: Commander Cressida with a shovel and a moon behind
